refnamediv.refpurpose: Test of residuals of fitted AR model.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: [siglev,res]=ARRES(w,A,v) computes the time series of residuals

of an AR(p) model with A=[A1 ... Ap]. If v has three dimensions, the 3rd dimension is treated as indicating multiple realizations (trials) of the time series, that is, v(:,:,itr) is taken as the itr-th trial.
Also returned is the significance level siglev of the modified Li-McLeod portmanteau (LMP) statistic.
Correlation matrices for the LMP statistic are computed up to lag k=20, which can be changed to lag k by using [siglev,res]=ARRES(w,A,v,k).

refsection.title: Bibliography
refsection.para: Li, W. K., and A. I. McLeod, 1981: Distribution of the
Residual Autocorrelations in Multivariate ARMA Time Series
Models, J. Roy. Stat. Soc. B, 43, 231--239.

simplelist.member: - Input data can be a ddataset object (to save memory resources)
24-Oct-10 Tim Mullen (added support for multiple realizations)
